message:
test: pin getaddrinfo + getnameinfo conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_getaddrinfo.rs covering 4 functions:
- getaddrinfo: v4 numeric (4 cases), v6 numeric (4 cases), invalid
  with AI_NUMERICHOST. Compares unique address+port set after dedup.
- freeaddrinfo: cleanup of returned list
- getnameinfo: v4 sockaddr_in to numeric host+serv strings
- gai_strerror: 6 known EAI codes, non-empty match

Discovered DISC-RESOLV-001: glibc returns one addrinfo per socktype
when hints.ai_socktype == 0; fl returns one. Test dedups addresses
before comparing; logs the multiplicity divergence.

7 tests pass.

Bead: bd-gai1
